phases.name: Foundation & Configuration
phases.description: Setup project structure, build configuration, test environment, and Docker/nginx infrastructure

tasks.title: Setup Vite project with React
tasks.description: Initialize Vite project with React plugin, configure for development and production builds, setup entry point and root HTML
acceptanceCriteria: vite.config.js defines React plugin and jsdom test environment
index.html provides root div#app
npm run dev starts dev server successfully
npm run build produces dist/ artifact with minified code

tasks.title: Configure CSS Modules with camelCase
tasks.description: Setup CSS Modules in Vite with camelCase convention for class names
acceptanceCriteria: CSS module files (.module.css or .css) processed with camelCase convention
Import syntax works: import styles from './Component.css'
Class names accessible as styles.className

tasks.title: Setup Docker and nginx configuration
tasks.description: Create Dockerfile with multi-stage build (Node build → nginx serve) and nginx SPA routing configuration
acceptanceCriteria: Dockerfile uses node:20-alpine for build stage
Vite build output copied to nginx html directory
nginx.conf handles SPA routing with try_files to index.html
HEALTHCHECK endpoint responds on port 80
Docker build completes successfully

tasks.title: Setup test environment with Vitest and React Testing Library
tasks.description: Configure Vitest for unit and integration tests, add React Testing Library, setup test utilities
acceptanceCriteria: npm test runs Vitest in watch mode
test/setup.js configures jsdom environment
renderWithProviders helper wraps components in AppContext
localStorage mocked globally for tests

tasks.title: Create initial directory structure
tasks.description: Create all necessary directories per §6 file structure specification
acceptanceCriteria: All directories from §6 exist
__tests__/ subdirectories created in all relevant modules
__fixtures__/ directory created in test/habits/
shared/, Dashboard.page/, Habits.section/, Settings.page/ subdirectories created

phases.name: Core Behaviors (Pure Functions)
phases.description: Implement all business logic as pure functions with no side effects

tasks.title: Implement habitFactory with UUIDv7 generator
tasks.description: Create habitFactory.js with createHabit() and generateUUIDv7(). UUIDv7 generates time-ordered unique IDs: 48-bit ms timestamp + version bits + 74 random bits
acceptanceCriteria: generateUUIDv7() returns valid UUIDv7 format strings
Generated UUIDs are time-ordered (lexicographically sortable by creation time)
createHabit() returns object with all required fields: id, name, description, schedule, color, completions[], skips[], createdAt, archivedAt
Factory handles all schedule types: daily, days_of_week (with days array), times_per_week (with n)
All fields initialized correctly per §4 AppState shape

tasks.title: Implement streakCalculator
tasks.description: Calculate current and longest streaks for all schedule types handling skips, gaps, and retroactive completion dates
acceptanceCriteria: calculateCurrentStreak(habit, today) returns correct count for daily habits
Handles days_of_week schedule (counts each scheduled day as potential streak increment)
Handles times_per_week schedule (rolling week completion counting)
Breaks streak appropriately at gaps or per spec definition
calculateLongestStreak(habit) tracks maximum consecutive completions
Returns 0 for habits with no completions
All spec §8 streak test cases pass (7 test cases minimum)

tasks.title: Implement strengthCalculator
tasks.description: Calculate habit strength level (fragile, forming, solid, locked_in) based on completion rate in past 60 days
acceptanceCriteria: calculateStrength(habit, today) returns one of: 'fragile', 'forming', 'solid', 'locked_in'
Thresholds per spec: 0-20% fragile, 20-50% forming, 50-80% solid, 80-100% locked_in
Works correctly for all schedule types
Handles zero-scheduled habits appropriately
All spec §8 strength test cases pass (4 test cases)

tasks.title: Implement scheduleRules
tasks.description: Determine which habits are scheduled for a given date and whether they're due today
acceptanceCriteria: isHabitDueToday(habit, today) returns true only if scheduled for today and not archived
Supports daily, days_of_week, times_per_week schedules
Days_of_week uses ISO 8601 (Monday = 0) per §3
Times_per_week checks rolling week completions
Returns false for archived habits
getScheduledDaysInRange(habit, fromDate, toDate) returns list of scheduled dates
All spec §8 due-today test cases pass

tasks.title: Implement completionRules
tasks.description: State mutation functions: addHabit, updateHabit, archiveHabit, unarchiveHabit, resetHabit, markComplete, markSkip, undoCheckin, setPreference. All return new state objects (immutable)
acceptanceCriteria: Exports 9 functions: addHabit, updateHabit, archiveHabit, unarchiveHabit, resetHabit, markComplete, markSkip, undoCheckin, setPreference
addHabit(state, payload) creates new habit via factory and adds to habits array
updateHabit(state, {id, ...fields}) merges fields into existing habit
archiveHabit sets archivedAt timestamp; unarchiveHabit clears it
resetHabit clears completions and skips arrays
markComplete(state, {habitId, date}) adds date to completions, removes from skips
markSkip(state, {habitId, date}) adds date to skips, removes from completions
markComplete/markSkip enforce 60-day window guard (return null outside window)
undoCheckin(state, {habitId, date}) removes date from both arrays
setPreference(state, {key, value}) updates preferences object
All functions maintain immutability (never mutate input state)
Mutual exclusion enforced: date never in both completions and skips
Deduplication: duplicate dates handled silently
All spec §8 mutation test cases pass

tasks.title: Implement importValidator
tasks.description: Shape validation, serialization, and export filename generation functions
acceptanceCriteria: isValidAppState(parsed) validates shape: habits array, preferences object, schemaVersion number
isValidAppState returns false for null, non-objects, missing required fields
serializeAppState(state) returns JSON string with 2-space indent
buildExportFilename(today) returns 'habit-tracker-export-YYYY-MM-DD.json'
All functions are pure (no side effects, no DOM access)
Spec §8 import validation test cases pass

phases.name: Storage & State Management
phases.description: Implement localStorage adapter, AppContext with initialization logic, and reducer

tasks.title: Implement localStorageAdapter
tasks.description: Wrap localStorage with preSaveHook/postLoadHook passthrough, implement save/load/isAvailable functions
acceptanceCriteria: STORAGE_KEY = 'habitTracker'
isAvailable() detects localStorage availability via test key
load() reads localStorage, applies postLoadHook, returns parsed JSON or null
save(state) serializes state, applies preSaveHook, writes to localStorage
preSaveHook and postLoadHook are identity functions at v1
Hooks replaceable without changing other code for encryption support
Errors caught and logged; save() returns true/false; load() returns null on failure

tasks.title: Implement AppContext and AppProvider
tasks.description: Create React Context with AppProvider component. Initialize state from localStorage, handle unavailable storage and corrupt data
acceptanceCriteria: AppContext created and exported
AppProvider component handles initialization
useReducer initialized with habitsReducer
Initializer checks isAvailable() before load()
Returns StorageUnavailableError if unavailable
Returns DEFAULT_STATE if load() returns null (first run)
Returns CorruptDataRecovery if loaded state invalid
CorruptDataRecovery offers Import or Reset All options

tasks.title: Implement habitsReducer and state mutations
tasks.description: Create reducer that dispatches to completionRules behavior functions and calls save() after each mutation
acceptanceCriteria: habitsReducer(state, action) exported as default
applyAction(state, action) implements switch with all action types
Action types: ADD_HABIT, UPDATE_HABIT, ARCHIVE_HABIT, UNARCHIVE_HABIT, RESET_HABIT, MARK_COMPLETE, MARK_SKIP, UNDO_CHECKIN, SET_PREFERENCE, REPLACE_STATE
Each case delegates to corresponding completionRules function
save(nextState) called after computing next state
Errors logged; execution continues (silent persistence failure)
REPLACE_STATE used by import (sets state to action.payload)
Default case returns state unchanged
Immutability maintained

phases.name: Repositories (Hooks)
phases.description: Implement useHabitsRepository hook that exposes repository functions

tasks.title: Implement useHabitsRepository hook
tasks.description: Custom hook consuming AppContext and dispatching actions. Expose read/write functions: getAll, getById, addHabit, updateHabit, archiveHabit, unarchiveHabit, resetHabit, markComplete, markSkip, undoCheckin, setPreference, replaceState
acceptanceCriteria: useHabitsRepository() hook exported
getAll() returns state.habits array
getById(id) returns single habit or null
addHabit(name, schedule, color) dispatches ADD_HABIT with factory-created habit
updateHabit(id, fields) dispatches UPDATE_HABIT
archiveHabit(id) dispatches ARCHIVE_HABIT
unarchiveHabit(id) dispatches UNARCHIVE_HABIT
resetHabit(id) dispatches RESET_HABIT
markComplete(id, date) dispatches MARK_COMPLETE
markSkip(id, date) dispatches MARK_SKIP
undoCheckin(id, date) dispatches UNDO_CHECKIN
setPreference(key, value) dispatches SET_PREFERENCE
replaceState(newState) dispatches REPLACE_STATE (for import)
All persistence via reducer (no direct localStorage calls)

phases.name: Shared UI Components
phases.description: Implement reusable UI components used across multiple pages

tasks.title: Implement Modal component
tasks.description: Wrapper around native <dialog> element with title, children, and close functionality
acceptanceCriteria: Exports default component accepting title, children, onClose props
Wraps native <dialog> element
Title rendered as heading inside dialog
Close button provided and calls onClose
CSS Module styles dialog with overlay
Used by import confirmation and reset confirmation flows

tasks.title: Implement StreakBadge component
tasks.description: Display current streak count as a styled badge pill
acceptanceCriteria: Accepts streak (number) prop
Renders as styled pill/badge with consistent sizing
Shows streak count and/or fire emoji
CSS Module styling with theme-aware colors

tasks.title: Implement StrengthBadge component
tasks.description: Display habit strength level as colored pill (fragile/forming/solid/locked_in)
acceptanceCriteria: Accepts strength prop (fragile|forming|solid|locked_in)
Renders as colored pill matching strength level
Color scheme: red/orange/yellow/green progression
CSS Module with color variants per strength level

tasks.title: Implement CalendarHeatmap component
tasks.description: CSS Grid calendar showing 60+ days of completions/skips with status coloring and click-to-checkin
acceptanceCriteria: Accepts habit and onCellClick(date, action) props
Renders CSS Grid showing 60+ past days and future days
Each cell has data-status: completed|skipped|missed|not-scheduled|future
CSS colors cells by status
Cells older than 60 days read-only (no click handler)
Cells within 60 days clickable; toggles between completed/skipped/empty
Hover shows date and status tooltip
Integrates with retroactive check-in flow
Renders in <300ms for 60+ days

phases.name: Views & Pages
phases.description: Implement all page components and view layer

tasks.title: Implement App.jsx root component and routing
tasks.description: Root component with BrowserRouter, Routes, AppProvider, main layout, and navigation container
acceptanceCriteria: BrowserRouter wraps entire app
AppProvider wraps routes and navigation
Routes defined: / → Dashboard, /habits/* → Habits.section, /settings → Settings
Navigation component rendered outside Routes (persistent)
Main layout grid/flexbox positions nav (fixed bottom on mobile)
Root CSS custom properties defined for light/dark theme
CSS Module for App layout

tasks.title: Implement Navigation component
tasks.description: Persistent nav component with NavLinks to Dashboard, Habits, Settings
acceptanceCriteria: NavLink components for /, /habits, /settings routes
Active state indicated via className toggle
Fixed position at bottom on mobile, inline on desktop
CSS Module styling with theme-aware colors

tasks.title: Implement Dashboard page
tasks.description: Shows habits due today with check-in controls, SummaryPanel, and HabitCheckInRow for each due habit
acceptanceCriteria: Uses useHabitsRepository and isHabitDueToday
Computes due-today list on render (no stored derived data)
SummaryPanel shows: total active, completed today, due today, strength breakdown (recharts bar chart)
HabitCheckInRow for each due habit: name, streak badge, strength badge, complete/skip/undo buttons
Buttons dispatch correct repository functions with today's date
Index file exports DashboardPage
CSS Module styling with theme support

tasks.title: Implement Habits section with routing
tasks.description: Section component with nested routes for /habits, /habits/new, /habits/:id, /habits/:id/edit
acceptanceCriteria: Routes defined for HabitList (GET /habits), HabitForm create (GET /habits/new), HabitDetail (GET /habits/:id), HabitForm edit (GET /habits/:id/edit)
Outlet component for sub-routes
Index file exports HabitsSection

tasks.title: Implement HabitList page
tasks.description: Shows all active habits with filter bar, HabitRow components, and New Habit button
acceptanceCriteria: Displays all active (non-archived) habits
HabitRow shows: name, schedule description, streak, strength, clickable to detail
New Habit button navigates to /habits/new
Filter bar (search by name and/or schedule type)
Empty state message if no habits
Index file exports HabitListPage
CSS Module styling

tasks.title: Implement HabitDetail page
tasks.description: Full habit detail view with CalendarHeatmap, stats, and action buttons
acceptanceCriteria: Fetches habit by :habitId param
Shows CalendarHeatmap with 60 days of history
Click-to-checkin dispatches markComplete/markSkip/undoCheckin
HabitStats shows: current streak, longest streak, strength, completion rate %
Action buttons: Edit, Reset (with Modal), Archive (with Modal)
Back button to HabitList
Not found: error message or redirect
CSS Module styling

tasks.title: Implement HabitForm page (create and edit)
tasks.description: Form for creating/editing habits with schedule picker and color picker components
acceptanceCriteria: Mode prop: 'create' or 'edit' (from route matching)
Create: empty form, calls addHabit() with generated ID
Edit: pre-fills fields from :habitId, calls updateHabit()
Form fields: name (required), description (optional), schedule type (required), color (required)
SchedulePicker: type selector + type-specific options (daily: none, days_of_week: checkboxes, times_per_week: number input)
ColorPicker: color swatches selector
Form validation: name required, schedule valid
Submit: saves and navigates to HabitDetail or HabitList
Cancel button navigates back
CSS Module styling

tasks.title: Implement Settings page
tasks.description: Dark mode toggle, import/export controls, and ImportFlow component
acceptanceCriteria: Dark mode toggle dispatches SET_PREFERENCE(darkMode, boolean)
Toggle state reads from AppContext preferences
Export button: serializeAppState + triggerDownload with filename 'habit-tracker-export-YYYY-MM-DD.json'
ImportFlow state machine: idle → confirm-backup → file-pick → validating → confirm-replace → done | error
Import validates JSON parse and isValidAppState
Import shows confirmation Modal before replacing state
Import errors: inline messages, no state modified
Reset All button with confirmation Modal; clears all data
CSS Module styling

tasks.title: Implement error boundary components
tasks.description: StorageUnavailableError and CorruptDataRecovery components for AppContext init errors
acceptanceCriteria: StorageUnavailableError: full-page error, message, no actions
CorruptDataRecovery: full-page error, message, Import and Reset All action buttons
Both render outside main app routes
CSS styling matches app theme

phases.name: Testing
phases.description: Write comprehensive unit, component, and integration tests per spec §8

tasks.title: Setup test fixtures and utilities
tasks.description: Create habit fixtures and renderWithProviders helper for testing
acceptanceCriteria: renderWithProviders(component, {initialState}) wraps in AppContext
Daily habit fixture with all fields
Days of week habit fixture
Times per week habit fixture
Fixtures exported and importable

tasks.title: Write streakCalculator unit tests
tasks.description: Full coverage of calculateCurrentStreak and calculateLongestStreak per spec §8 test cases
acceptanceCriteria: Test: Daily habit, 7 consecutive completions → 7
Test: Daily habit with skip → streak resets
Test: Daily habit with gap → 0
Test: Days of week, 3 completions → 3
Test: Days of week, missed middle → affected per spec
Test: Times per week, threshold met → >0
Test: Times per week, threshold missed → affected
Test: Longest streak calculated
Test: Zero completions → 0
All 7 spec test cases pass

tasks.title: Write strengthCalculator unit tests
tasks.description: Full coverage of calculateStrength for all schedule types and levels
acceptanceCriteria: Test: 0-20% completion → fragile
Test: 20-50% completion → forming
Test: 50-80% completion → solid
Test: 80-100% completion → locked_in
Test: Zero scheduled days → appropriate handling
Test: All schedule types (daily, days_of_week, times_per_week)
All 4 spec strength test cases pass

tasks.title: Write scheduleRules unit tests
tasks.description: Full coverage of isHabitDueToday for all schedule types and edges
acceptanceCriteria: Test: Daily habit due every day
Test: Days of week due only on scheduled days
Test: Times per week due on available day
Test: Archived habit never due
Test: Future habit not due
Test: getScheduledDaysInRange returns correct dates
Spec §8 due-today test cases pass

tasks.title: Write completionRules unit tests
tasks.description: Full coverage of all state mutation functions with immutability and guards
acceptanceCriteria: Test: addHabit creates with factory fields
Test: updateHabit merges fields
Test: archiveHabit sets archivedAt
Test: unarchiveHabit clears archivedAt
Test: resetHabit clears completions/skips
Test: markComplete adds and removes from skips
Test: markComplete outside 60-day window → null
Test: markSkip adds and removes from completions
Test: undoCheckin removes from both
Test: Mutual exclusion enforced
Test: Deduplication handled
Test: setPreference updates
Test: Immutability maintained
Test: Guard clauses return null on invalid input
All spec §8 mutation test cases pass

tasks.title: Write habitFactory and importValidator unit tests
tasks.description: Full coverage of factory and validation functions
acceptanceCriteria: habitFactory tests: generateUUIDv7 returns valid format, time-ordered, createHabit initializes correctly
habitFactory: all schedule types handled
importValidator tests: isValidAppState accepts/rejects correctly
importValidator: serializeAppState returns JSON
importValidator: buildExportFilename generates correct format
Spec §8 import validation test cases pass

tasks.title: Write localStorageAdapter unit tests
tasks.description: Full coverage of save, load, isAvailable with localStorage mocking
acceptanceCriteria: Test: isAvailable returns true when working
Test: isAvailable returns false on error
Test: save writes and returns true
Test: save returns false on error
Test: load reads and parses
Test: load returns null on missing key
Test: load returns null on parse error
Test: Round-trip save/load works
Test: Hooks called correctly

tasks.title: Write habitsReducer unit tests
tasks.description: Full coverage of all reducer action types and mutations
acceptanceCriteria: Test: All 10 action types work correctly
Test: save() called after each mutation
Test: Unknown actions return state unchanged
Test: State shape maintained

tasks.title: Write shared component tests
tasks.description: Component tests for Modal, StreakBadge, StrengthBadge, CalendarHeatmap
acceptanceCriteria: Modal: renders title/children, close callback works
StreakBadge: displays streak
StrengthBadge: correct color class per level
CalendarHeatmap: renders grid, status applied, click callback works, >60d days read-only

tasks.title: Write page component tests
tasks.description: Component tests for Dashboard, HabitList, HabitDetail, HabitForm, Settings
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard: shows due habits, summary, buttons dispatch actions
HabitList: lists active habits, new button works, rows link to detail
HabitDetail: shows stats, heatmap, action buttons
HabitForm: create mode empty, edit mode pre-filled, submit dispatches
Settings: dark toggle, export, import flow
All user interactions verified

tasks.title: Write integration tests
tasks.description: Integration tests for repository hooks with context and reducer
acceptanceCriteria: Test: markComplete adds date and persists
Test: markSkip adds date and persists
Test: Mutual exclusion enforced
Test: Import file replaces state
Test: Reset clears habits
Test: Archive hides from active list
Test: Repository reads reflect persisted state
